solutions.solution: From both the statements area can be found independently. Area = π × (radius)² or Area = (circumference)²/4π
If the day of any date in history is given, the day of any other date can be found. [See Magical Book on Quicker Maths published by RPH Publications for the method.]
Even together these statements are not sufficient: it never becomes clear whether X is the brother or sister of Y.
From the two statements taken together, the age can be found out. It is equal to 62 - 30 = 32 years.
The statements do not provide solid reasons why it should be believed that Tendulkar will hit a century today. Even the best of batsmen can fail on even the most suitable of pitches.

The two statements do not provide complete evidence about the exact date of murder. The police took 4 days to detect who the murderer was. But how many extra days did it take to nab the murderer? For example, if the police took 4 days to detect and 13 days to chase and catch the murderer then the murder could have occurred on 18 - (4 + 13) = 1st. Hence, the data given in the question are not sufficient to answer the question.

The two statements are not sufficient to answer the question. In fact, for any square, whatever be its size, the two statements I and II are always true. Thus, in fact, no additional data is given. [If you cannot imagine how the two statements I and II will always be true for any square, refer to Magical Book on Quicker Maths.]

If the group is of two people only and if Sudha is not the tallest, then the other person, i.e. Mohan, must be the tallest. Hence, the two statements, taken together, are sufficient to answer the question.

Both the statements are separately sufficient to answer the question. From I, it is obvious that price of one pen = Rs 17. From II, it is obvious that price of one pen = Rs 18, because 18 is not a prime number. Hence the answer can be obtained (the answer is 'No') from both the statements separately.
Think keenly. You can get the answer from I alone but not from II alone. Let us see how.
